title: carapa palustris
intro: Carapa palustris, also known as the swamp carapa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Carapa palustris include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues due to its potent antioxidant and antimicrobial compounds. Herbal preparations of Carapa palustris can be made by extracting its bark, leaves, or seeds, which can be used in the form of tinctures, teas, or topical creams.
